discovery.page_text: Loading Google Play Console To publish apps, finish setting up your developer account View details notifications Notifications The Same Old Waves keyboard_backspace All apps dashboard Dashboard bar_chart Statistics overview Publishing overview shield Protected with Play rocket_launch Test and release vital_signs Monitor and improve Reach and devices expand_more Ratings and reviews expand_more Android vitals expand_more Policy and programs expand_less Policy status App content Teacher Approved finance_mode Grow users sell Monetize with Play keyboard_backspace App content Content ratings Discard changes check Category check Questionnaire 3 Summary Summary Ratings shown below may differ from the ratings shown to users on Google Play. Google may reject your app or app update for misrepresentation of your app’s content Google may use your questionnaire responses to generate ratings for specific territories as required by local law Rating authorities participating in IARC may change your app's rating after they review it Google and IARC will share your contact information, questionnaire responses, ratings, developer support requests, and app details with rating authorities. Learn more Category Game Fear Pictures or sounds likely to be scary (Often) Your ratings Australia Rating authority: Australian Classification Board (ACB) Rating Parental Guidance Content descriptors Scary Scenes Brazil Rating authority: Classificação Indicativa (ClassInd) Rating Rated 10+ Content descriptors Fear North America Rating authority: Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB) Rating Everyone 10+ Content descriptors Fantasy Violence South Korea Rating authority: Game Rating and Administration Committee (GRAC) Rating 12+ Content descriptors Fear Taiwan Rating authority: Digital Game Self-regulation Committee (DGSC) Rating Parental Guidance 12 Content descriptors Horror Saudi Arabia Rating authority: General Authority of Media Regulation (Gmedia) Rating 12 Content descriptors - Europe Rating authority: Pan-European Game Information (PEGI) Rating PEGI 7 Content descriptors Fear Germany Rating authority: Unterhaltungssoftware Selbstkontrolle (USK) Rating USK: Ages 12+ Content descriptors Dark Atmosphere Rest of world Rating authority: IARC Generic Rating Rated for 7+ Content descriptors Fear Russia Rating authority: Google Play Rating Rated for 7+ Content descriptors Fear If you save, changes will be saved in Publishing overview, ready for you to send for review Back Save Product updates Status dashboard Help © 2026 Google Privacy Developer Distribution Agreement Terms of Service
